reviews.review_title: How to get out of the horror mode
reviews.review_description: Ok, so, when u go close to the scary mario, it will take you to a horror mode of the game, and if u don't know how to leave the horror mode, just go to the entry of the castle and to your right there is a 3d gray rectangle that says "leave" and when u go into the 3d gray rectangle, it will take you back to the regular game.  I hoped that helped anyone that doesn't know how to leave the horror mode! :]

The Gorilla Mario 64 game is easily one of the greatest masterpieces ever created in the history of gaming. The moment you launch the game and see a giant gorilla running around collecting bananas instead of stars, you know you're experiencing peak entertainment. Every jump feels powerful, every backflip feels legendary, and every time the gorilla accidentally launches itself off a cliff at Mach 7, it somehow becomes even more fun. The graphics are so unbelievably amazing that you almost forget the game is held together by pure gorilla energy and questionable physics. The soundtrack consists entirely of sounds that make you want to climb a tree and challenge the nearest plumber to a race. Critics have described the experience as "completely ridiculous" and "why does this exist," which are obviously signs of true greatness. By the end of the game, players are left wondering how any other video game could possibly compete with a gorilla performing triple jumps through castles while collecting magical bananas. Truly, Gorilla Mario 64 is not just a game—it is a lifestyle, a philosophy, and perhaps the pinnacle of human achievement.

reviews.review_title: Good game no interact with scary Mario
reviews.review_description: I was playing having a good time then then some monkey told me then to touch the Mario and all the time my game is messed up I I can't play in public my game is stuck in some strange horror mode how do I get out

developer_response.body: To return to normal mode, go towards the castle and walk into the "return" boundary.
